title: event — PHP attribute contracts
description: One attribute — `#[AsEventListener]` — marks a service class as a subscriber to event-lifecycle events. AttributeDiscovery scans + wires it to the event map declared in events.json.

attributes.name: AsEventListener

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`EventCreated`, `EventCancellationBroadcast`, `EventPricingChanged`, etc.). Empty = subscribe to every event in Academorix\Sports\Event\Events\*. Names validated against events.json at boot.
